verdict_reasoning: TGOLN2 (TGN46/TGN48/TGN51) is a type I integral membrane protein whose steady-state localization is the trans-Golgi network. It cycles between the TGN and early endosomes as part of retrograde trafficking machinery, never reaching the plasma membrane in any documented stable or induced surface pool. Its canonical biology is entirely endomembrane-resident. No evidence of cell-surface display under baseline, stress, oncogenic, or cell-death conditions. No therapeutic programs targeting it as a surface antigen. Classified as endomembrane-resident.
